explanation.summary: The value of 'output' (int) is assigned to 'scaled' (uint8_t). This implicit narrowing conversion may silently truncate the value, causing data loss and incorrect program behavior.
explanation.code_evidence: The code snippet contains an implicit narrowing conversion from int to uint8_t.

risk_analysis.why: The implicit narrowing conversion may lead to data loss and incorrect program behavior.

deviation_advice.recommended_decision: Implement the fix to avoid data loss and incorrect program behavior.
deviation_advice.required_justification: MISRA C:2012 Rule 10.3 requires explicit casts for narrowing conversions.
